items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Oh, he could be Sixi's son.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Let's go find him and talk.

dialog.stepLabel: Rover: "His family must not know he's skipping class...."

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: His family must not know he's skipping class.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Go talk to Wulü. Maybe he knows something.

dialog.stepLabel: Sixi: "What do I always tell you, hmm? Why are you skipping school?..."

items.speaker: Sixi
items.text: What do I always tell you, hmm? Why are you skipping school?

items.speaker: Jiu
items.text: I'm not skippin school! I just want to learn something not taught in the classroom...

items.speaker: Sixi
items.text: What do you mean by that? Explain yourself.

items.speaker: Jiu
items.text: It's just... something not in a textbook, something that'll teach me how I can help you, Dad!

items.speaker: Jiu
items.text: You're always so busy and don't have time for me, so I want to help you...

items.speaker: Sixi
items.text: You can help me by attending your classes, you know!

items.speaker: Sixi
items.text: They're supposed to be teaching you practical life skills. If you learn something interesting, you can even teach your old man something new!

items.speaker: Sixi
items.text: Anyway... there really are issues at the mine recently. I promise you, once they are settled, we'll spend more time together, okay?

items.speaker: Sixi
items.text: Yes. I'll keep my word. But before that, you need to keep yours and stay in school!

items.speaker: Jiu
items.text: Deal! I promise I'll stay in school!
